description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python tests that runs on push to master and develop branches and on pull requests to these branches. Use a matrix job strategy to test on multiple platforms (ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest) and Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11). For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies from requirements.txt and requirements-test.txt, run tests with pytest and coverage, and upload the coverage report to Codecov only for ubuntu-latest with Python 3.9.
